_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Change management involves managing changes to services, organisations, suppliers or configuration items, and the associated documentation.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of organizational change management principles as applied to large-scale data and AI transformation programs, including adoption barriers, culture change levers, and executive sponsorship requirements.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-003 (OP, cosine: 0.571), DQ-K-009 (DQ, cosine: 0.520).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.449). Shared vocabulary: [change, management]. DDaT-only terms [associated, changes, configuration, documentation, involves, items] vs WIDAI-only terms [adoption, ai, applied, barriers, culture, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.860 (P=0.868, R=0.853). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DDaT element and 25-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Change management involves managing changes to services, organisations, supplier" and "Knowledge of organizational change management principles as applied to large-sca" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.599 > STS 0.449 (gap +0.151). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [change, management] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [change, management]. DDaT-only: [associated, changes, configuration, documentation, involves, items]. WIDAI-only: [adoption, ai, applied, barriers, culture, data].
